creator: jendries@pragmeta.com
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Looks like it is fixed. Strange, I updated to 4.18_1 this morning and it
asked me, and just now did a 'portupgrade -f stunnel' and it didn't
(without updating the ports tree). I tried it on a few machines just now
that I upgraded this morning and they all showed this same behavior, not
sure why, but none of them asked me about the user/group. :)

Josh
